quiz1.missionText: Please turn on subtitles for the video

insight.title: How did you find the subtitle setting?
insight.subtitle: CC is an international standard symbol
insight.ccDesc: The 'CC' or subtitle icon (box with lines) is an international standard for subtitles since the TV broadcast era. It's recognized regardless of language.
insight.visibilityDesc: Most video players hide controls to avoid blocking the view. However, the 'tap to show' convention is deeply rooted in modern users.
insight.feedbackDesc: Changes like a red underline or brighter color indicate a feature is active, helping users understand state without reading labels.

quiz2.missionText: Go to the next video and seek to the middle

insight.title: How did you operate without hesitation?
insight.subtitle: Player UI layout is key
insight.skipDesc: The '▶︎▶︎|' symbol has meant 'skip to next track' since the cassette era. Placing it next to the play button is a global standard.
insight.seekTitle: Red line is a metaphor for flow of time
insight.seekDesc: The progress bar represents time flowing from left to right. Red highlights the 'current position', intuitively showing how to jump to past or future.
insight.targetTitle: Middle is easy to target visually
insight.targetDesc: Targeting the middle of the bar by sensing half of its physical length allows users to accurately reach 40-60% without text info.

insight.title: Did you notice the hidden operation?
insight.subtitle: Long press is a shortcut for acceleration
insight.gestureTitle: Long press gesture on video area
insight.gestureDesc: In many video apps, long pressing the screen triggers '2x speed' playback. This 'Aha!' moment shortcut saves time opening menus.
insight.gearTitle: ⚙ icon is the gateway to settings
insight.gearDesc: The gear icon means 'settings' or 'customization' across all OS/apps. It builds trust that detailed changes happen here without reading text.
insight.speedDesc: '1.5x' or '2x' are international mathematical symbols for magnification, serving as a language-free way to express speed.

quiz4.missionText: Change to highest quality and download to device

insight.title: Highest difficulty cleared!
insight.subtitle: Symbol association is key
insight.qualityDesc: Numbers like 1080p or 2160p represent vertical resolution. Users know larger numbers mean better quality from experience, even without reading.
insight.downloadDesc: The downward arrow visualizes the physical action of dropping data from the cloud to your device (downloading), establishing its role as a save button.
insight.locationDesc: The menu row under the title often lists Like, Share, and Save (Download) from left to right. This familiar order helps decode unreadable text.
